results.rendered_html:
vilagna a.
1 Clinging or sticking to, resting on, fastened on; ākuṭilapakṣmavilagnaṃ  Ś. 7. 25 ;  Śi. 9. 20. 
2 Cast, fixed, directed;  Ku. 7. 50 
3 Gone by, elapsed (as time).
4 Thin, slender, delicate; madhyena sā vedivilagnamadhyā  Ku. 1. 39 ;  V. 4. 37. 
— gnaṃ
1 The waist.
2 The hips.
3 The rising of constellations.
